name: Maple Apple Pie from the Yankee Cookbook
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 quarts Apples (tart); peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place pie pan with pastry lining.
2. Arrange sliced tart apples in the pan.
3. Sprinkle maple sugar, salt, cinnamon, and flour evenly over the apples.
4. Dot with butter.
5. Cover with perforated top crust.
6. Brush with cream.
7. Bake in a hot oven (450°F) for 10 minutes.
8. Reduce heat to moderate (350°F) and bake for 40-50 minutes longer.
Makes 1 two-crust 9-inch pie.
